recommendations.title: Night of the Animated Dead
recommendations.overview: An animated retelling of ‘Night of the Living Dead’, in which a group of people in a rural farmhouse struggle to survive the threat of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.

recommendations.title: Feast
recommendations.overview: This Oscar-winning animated short film tells the story of one man's love life as seen through the eyes of his best friend and dog, Winston, and revealed bite by bite through the meals they share.

recommendations.title: The Ten Commandments: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows Moses leading and conducting the Hebrew people from the slavery of Egypt to the freedom towards the Promised Land according to the Ancient Testament Bible book of the Exodus. The story told like never before is faithful to the Scriptures.

recommendations.title: Anne of Green Gables
recommendations.overview: A retelling of L.M. Montgomery's story of Anne Shirley, an orphan who is accidentally sent to a couple looking to adopt a boy instead.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: The House
recommendations.overview: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer and a fed-up landlady become tied to the same mysterious house in this animated dark comedy.
recommendations.director: Paloma Baeza, Emma De Swaef, Marc James Roels, Niki Lindroth von Bahr

recommendations.title: The Little Prince
recommendations.overview: Based on the best-seller book 'The Little Prince', the movie tells the story of a little girl that lives with resignation in a world where efficiency and work are the only dogmas. Everything will change when accidentally she discovers her neighbor th

recommendations.title: Dear Basketball
recommendations.overview: An animated telling of Kobe Bryant's titular poem, signaling his retirement from the sport that made his name.

recommendations.title: The Cameraman's Revenge
recommendations.overview: A jilted husband takes his revenge by filming his wife and her lover and showing the result at the local cinema. This was one of Starewicz' first animated films, and stars a cast of animated beetles.
